scripts.stop: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Process node,python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000,5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force }"
scripts.dev:backend: cross-env PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 powershell -NoProfile -Command "cd backend; python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --workers 1"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:be && npm run install:fe
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && echo Setup complete! Create .env files and run npm run dev
